objective: Verify accuracy of cost records, validate cost allocation methods, and ensure cost efficiency across production, materials, labour, and overheads as per applicable cost accounting standards.

steps.action: Confirm statutory applicability (Companies (Cost Records and Audit) Rules), identify product/industry scope and CAS standards applicable.
Obtain and review cost accounting policies, allocation bases, and ERP cost centre structure.
Trace raw material consumption records: verify quantities, rates, and wastage against production records and stock registers.
Verify labour cost allocation: test attendance, pay registers, overtime, and allocation to production cost centres.
Validate overhead absorption: confirm actual vs. absorbed overheads, test allocation keys, and identify over/under-absorption.
Perform cost-of-production and cost-of-sales reconciliation to financial statements.
Benchmark unit costs against industry norms, prior period, and budgeted cost; identify inefficiencies and waste.
Prepare Cost Audit Report in prescribed format (Form CRA-3) and obtain management response.
File cost audit report with MCA via XBRL/CRA-4 filing within statutory deadline.
Archive cost audit workpapers with blockchain hash anchor for tamper-proof retention.

evidence_checklist.description: Cost accounting policy and CAS mapping
Material consumption registers and purchase invoices
Filed Form CRA-3 and MCA receipt

test_scripts.name: Material Cost Trace
test_scripts.sample_rule: Top 20% by value and 100% of unusual/high-wastage items
steps: Select sample of issue vouchers from material issues register.
Agree quantity to production records and rate to purchase invoices.
Compute expected material cost and compare to recorded cost.
test_scripts.pass_condition: Material cost records agree to source documents within acceptable tolerance.

test_scripts.name: Overhead Absorption Validation
steps: Obtain actual overhead costs per cost centre.
Recompute absorbed overhead using agreed allocation base (machine hours, labour hours).
Calculate over/under absorption and confirm accounting treatment.
Assess reasonableness of allocation base vs. actual production mix.
test_scripts.pass_condition: Over/under absorption is within board-approved policy bands and correctly disclosed.

test_scripts.name: Cost Efficiency Benchmarking
steps: Compute unit cost per product for current vs prior year.
Compare to industry cost benchmarks where available.
Identify cost centres with unfavourable variance > threshold.
Obtain management explanation for significant deviations.
test_scripts.pass_condition: All material variances are explained, documented, and considered in the audit opinion.

closure_gates.criteria: Cost records reconcile to financial statements.
Form CRA-3 filed with MCA within deadline.
